growth_records.cite: Heidi Pauer et al. Bioactive small molecules produced by the human gut microbiome modulate Vibrio cholerae sessile and planktonic lifestyles. Gut Microbes (2021). DOI:10.1080/19490976.2021.1918993. [PMC8143261]
growth_records.method: reported doubling time (52.72 min); mu calculated
growth_records.snippet: ...the largest difference being 36.6% at 5 hours of growth (doubling time of 52.72 +/- 1.70 minutes for control cultures vs. 61.64 +/- 7.03 minutes for cultures containing the extract).
growth_records.notes: Control (untreated) V. cholerae VC833 in BHI broth: reported doubling time td = 52.72 +/- 1.70 min = 0.8787 h. mu = ln2/td = 0.6931/0.8787 = 0.789 h-1. BHI broth composition not stated in paper (medium_composition_stated:false); routine growth reported in BHI supplemented with hemin 5 mg/mL at 37 C, but growth-curve medium was BHI broth. No uptake/secretion/MFA data reported (paper is an RNA-seq/motility antivirulence study). Growth curve read at OD620.

growth_records.strain: VC833 (multidrug-resistant O1 strain, isolated from human feces, Nigeria 2010 cholera outbreak)
growth_records.cite: Heidi Pauer et al. Bioactive small molecules produced by the human gut microbiome modulate Vibrio cholerae sessile and planktonic lifestyles. Gut Microbes (2021). DOI:10.1080/19490976.2021.1918993. [PMC8143261]
growth_records.method: reported doubling time (61.64 min); mu calculated
growth_records.snippet: ...doubling time of 52.72 +/- 1.70 minutes for control cultures vs. 61.64 +/- 7.03 minutes for cultures containing the extract). This reduction was not caused by either pH differences or solvent impurities...
growth_records.notes: V. cholerae VC833 grown in BHI broth WITH human fecal small-molecule extract (antivirulence perturbation condition). Reported doubling time td = 61.64 +/- 7.03 min = 1.0273 h. mu = ln2/td = 0.6931/1.0273 = 0.675 h-1. Distinct experimental growth condition (extract-treated) vs the control record above; growth reduction (36.6% slower at 5 h) attributed to the fecal metabolome, not pH/solvent. Medium base = BHI broth, composition not stated.
